mapper.select: SELECT wordId, word, pronounce, haveTag, created_at, updated_at FROM word ORDER BY wordId
SELECT wordId, word, pronounce, haveTag, created_at, updated_at FROM word WHERE wordId = #{wordId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO word (word, pronounce, haveTag) VALUES (#{word}, #{pronounce}, #{haveTag})
mapper.update: UPDATE word SET word = #{word}, pronounce = #{pronounce}, haveTag = #{haveTag}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE wordId = #{wordId}
mapper.select: SELECT haveTag FROM word WHERE wordId = #{wordId}
